name: Mila, The Cosplayer.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You're at a convention and meet a woman sitting down, seemingly out of breath, and sweating quite a lot, so you approach to make conversation.

Yes, I know this is Hex Maniac, but I figured it easier to just make it not. Feels easier that way

On todays episode of the writer's poorly disguised fetish. Sweat. 

(Art by androjuniarto)
creator: wisperrr
